#### Warnings (Non-Blocking — But Don't Ignore Them)

| Warning | Meaning |
|---------|---------|
| `Marketplace has no plugins defined` | plugins array is empty |
| `No marketplace description provided` | description field missing |
| `Plugin name "x" is not kebab-case` | **Will be rejected by claude.ai Marketplace sync** — must fix |
